name: Kora Framework Skills
description: Official Kora Framework skills for building production-grade Java/Kotlin microservices with compile-time dependency injection. Zero reflection, zero proxies, zero runtime magic.

plugins.name: kora-v1
plugins.description: Complete Kora Framework 1.x development skill with 39 domain skills plus a meta-skill. Build HTTP services, databases, Kafka, gRPC, SOAP, OpenAPI, telemetry, AOP with compile-time DI.
